TC-0001.TestCaseDescription: Verify that the user can successfully Navigate to MediBook page
TC-0001.Preconditions: The user has a valid account and is on the login page.
TestSteps: Wait for the dashboard to load.
Click on Open Clinic App button.
TC-0001.ExpectedResult: The user should be successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard.

TC-0002.TestCaseDescription: Verify that the user can search for a doctor using the search functionality
Preconditions: The user is logged in and on the dashboard.
The search functionality is available on the dashboard.
TestSteps: Enter the name of a doctor (e.g., 'Dr. Smith').
Press the search button or hit enter.
Wait for the search results to load.
TC-0002.ExpectedResult: The user should be successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard.
